news.title:
Power Mech Projects secures a ₹296.4 Cr order from Maha Mumbai Metro for Mumbai Monorail O&M.
The 5-year contract covers a 19.54 km corridor with 17 stations from Sant Gadge Maharaj Chowk to Chembur.
news.summary:
Power Mech Projects secures a ₹296.4 Cr order from Maha Mumbai Metro for Mumbai Monorail O&M.
The 5-year contract covers a 19.54 km corridor with 17 stations from Sant Gadge Maharaj Chowk to Chembur.

news.title:
Power Mech secures ₹109.2 cr order from Hindustan Zinc, boosting shares 8% to ₹1,867.5 intraday high.
Despite gains, stock is down 25% YTD; recent wins include ₹709.6 cr Adani, ₹1,005 cr Mirzapur/Mahan contracts.
news.summary:
Power Mech secures ₹109.2 cr order from Hindustan Zinc, boosting shares 8% to ₹1,867.5 intraday high.
Despite gains, stock is down 25% YTD; recent wins include ₹709.6 cr Adani, ₹1,005 cr Mirzapur/Mahan contracts.

news.title: Power Mech Projects secures a Rs 109 crore order, boosting its pipeline.
news.summary: Power Mech Projects secures a Rs 109 crore order, boosting its pipeline.

news.title:
Power Mech Projects Ltd secured a ₹109.22 Cr order from Hindustan Zinc for 91.5 MW CPP O&M.
The 48-month domestic contract excludes GST and involves no promoter-related party transactions.
news.summary:
Power Mech Projects Ltd secured a ₹109.22 Cr order from Hindustan Zinc for 91.5 MW CPP O&M.
The 48-month domestic contract excludes GST and involves no promoter-related party transactions.

news.title:
WBSEDCL cancels 250 MW battery storage tender, rescinds PM Green award.
Power Mech Projects' order book reduced by ₹1,563 crore due to cancellation.
news.summary:
WBSEDCL cancels 250 MW battery storage tender, rescinds PM Green award.
Power Mech Projects' order book reduced by ₹1,563 crore due to cancellation.

news.title: Power Mech Projects Ltd reports WBSEDCL annulled a tender and rescinded LoA to its unit.
news.summary: Power Mech Projects Ltd reports WBSEDCL annulled a tender and rescinded LoA to its unit.

news.title: Power Mech Projects secures an order worth ₹7.1B, boosting its portfolio.
news.summary: Power Mech Projects secures an order worth ₹7.1B, boosting its portfolio.

news.title:
Power Mech secures Rs 709.6 Cr order from Adani Group for O&M at Tiroda Thermal Plant.
Contract spans 60 months from April 2026 to March 2031; not a related party transaction.
news.summary:
Power Mech secures Rs 709.6 Cr order from Adani Group for O&M at Tiroda Thermal Plant.
Contract spans 60 months from April 2026 to March 2031; not a related party transaction.

news.title:
Small-cap stocks like GPT Infraprojects, Power Mech, and Patel Engineering offer 3-year revenue visibility due to strong order books.
Power Mech's order backlog is Rs. 56,806 crore, Patel Engineering's Rs. 15,123 crore, and GPT's Rs. 4,415 crore, driving growth.
news.summary:
Small-cap stocks like GPT Infraprojects, Power Mech, and Patel Engineering offer 3-year revenue visibility due to strong order books.
Power Mech's order backlog is Rs. 56,806 crore, Patel Engineering's Rs. 15,123 crore, and GPT's Rs. 4,415 crore, driving growth.

news.title:
Power Mech Projects Ltd has shared its February 2026 investor presentation, highlighting strong growth with a 4x revenue scale-up over the last decade and a current order book of ₹18,332 Cr.
The company focuses on diversified sectors like power, railways, metro, mining, and renewables, with marquee projects like a 250 MW BESS and a 13.66 MW solar project under execution.
news.summary:
Power Mech Projects Ltd has shared its February 2026 investor presentation, highlighting strong growth with a 4x revenue scale-up over the last decade and a current order book of ₹18,332 Cr.
The company focuses on diversified sectors like power, railways, metro, mining, and renewables, with marquee projects like a 250 MW BESS and a 13.66 MW solar project under execution.

news.title:
Power Mech Projects' Q3 FY25 net sales rose 6.1% YoY to Rs 1,419.6 crore.
Net profit increased 14.6% YoY to Rs 94 crore; EPS grew to Rs 29.73 from Rs 25.94.
news.summary:
Power Mech Projects' Q3 FY25 net sales rose 6.1% YoY to Rs 1,419.6 crore.
Net profit increased 14.6% YoY to Rs 94 crore; EPS grew to Rs 29.73 from Rs 25.94.

news.title:
Cochin Shipyard secures Rs 3,267 crore LNG vessel orders from CMA CGM, pushing its order book to Rs 23,000 crore.
Power Mech gets Rs 1,000 crore Adani Power orders; BHEL wins Rs 1,200-1,500 crore SAIL project for IISCO expansion.
news.summary:
Cochin Shipyard secures Rs 3,267 crore LNG vessel orders from CMA CGM, pushing its order book to Rs 23,000 crore.
Power Mech gets Rs 1,000 crore Adani Power orders; BHEL wins Rs 1,200-1,500 crore SAIL project for IISCO expansion.

news.title:
Power Mech shares rose 5% after securing ₹1,000 crore orders from Adani Power subsidiaries.
Orders include ₹515 crore Mirzapur and ₹490 crore Mahan projects; shares trade at ₹2,182, up 4.6%.
news.summary:
Power Mech shares rose 5% after securing ₹1,000 crore orders from Adani Power subsidiaries.
Orders include ₹515 crore Mirzapur and ₹490 crore Mahan projects; shares trade at ₹2,182, up 4.6%.

news.title:
Power Mech Projects secures orders worth ₹1,000 Cr from Adani Power subsidiaries.
Contracts involve erection, testing, commissioning for 2x800 MW projects, to be completed in 36 months.
news.summary:
Power Mech Projects secures orders worth ₹1,000 Cr from Adani Power subsidiaries.

news.title: Power Mech Projects Ltd secures orders exceeding ₹10 billion.
news.summary: Power Mech Projects Ltd secures orders exceeding ₹10 billion.

news.title:
Power Mech plans FY26 capex of INR 380 Cr, with INR 280 Cr for washery.
FY27 capex rises to INR 520 Cr for washery, with 20-25% growth expected.
news.summary:
Power Mech plans FY26 capex of INR 380 Cr, with INR 280 Cr for washery.
FY27 capex rises to INR 520 Cr for washery, with 20-25% growth expected.

news.title:
Power Mech forecasts 20-25% revenue growth for FY27, with INR 10,000 Cr order inflow.
MDO segment revenue expected to rise from INR 250-260 Cr in FY26 to INR 1,800-1,900 Cr by FY28.
news.summary:
Power Mech forecasts 20-25% revenue growth for FY27, with INR 10,000 Cr order inflow.
MDO segment revenue expected to rise from INR 250-260 Cr in FY26 to INR 1,800-1,900 Cr by FY28.

news.title:
Power Mech lowers FY26 revenue forecast to INR 6,000 crore due to INR 700 crore UV Water Division funding shortfall.
Company targets FY26 order intake of INR 10,000 crore; YTD orders stand at INR 6,761 crore.
news.summary:
Power Mech lowers FY26 revenue forecast to INR 6,000 crore due to INR 700 crore UV Water Division funding shortfall.
Company targets FY26 order intake of INR 10,000 crore; YTD orders stand at INR 6,761 crore.

news.title:
Power Mech Projects' Q3 EBITDA rose to 1.6B INR from 1.51B INR YoY.
EBITDA margin slightly declined to 11.27% from 11.29% YoY.
news.summary:
Power Mech Projects' Q3 EBITDA rose to 1.6B INR from 1.51B INR YoY.
EBITDA margin slightly declined to 11.27% from 11.29% YoY.

news.title:
Power Mech Projects reported Q3 FY26 revenue of Rs.1433 Cr and profit of Rs.100.5 Cr.
Board approved RTA change from KFin to VCCIPL; noted Rs.3.6 Cr labor liability.
news.summary:
Power Mech Projects reported Q3 FY26 revenue of Rs.1433 Cr and profit of Rs.100.5 Cr.
